description: Learn the basics of chopping vegetables safely and efficiently.

steps.instruction: Gather your ingredients and tools: knife, cutting board, and vegetables.
Hold the knife correctly with a firm grip.
Use the claw grip to hold the vegetable while chopping.
Chop the vegetable into small, even pieces.
Practice with different vegetables to improve your skills.

safety_tips: Always keep your fingers away from the blade.
Use a stable cutting board to prevent slipping.
Be cautious when handling sharp knives.
